title: elaphoglossum skottsbergii
intro: Elaphoglossum skottsbergii, also known as the Chilean fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the temperate rainforests of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum skottsbergii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, and even act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Elaphoglossum skottsbergii can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and making it available for consumption.
